title: Shopify Growth OS / LK Growth
source_of_truth: Shopify live/admin only when consulted read-only or with scoped approval
GA4/GSC/GMC as demand and performance context
Brain as evidence/history/decisions, not live store state
guardrails: No Shopify product, collection, theme, SEO field, metafield, price, inventory, or production write without explicit scoped approval
DEV/theme preview is not production truth
Do not infer current Shopify state from backups, reports, or historical receipts
